description.message: Monitor RSS feeds, websites, and forums. Create scheduled monitors to automatically scrape and process content.

offline.message: Server is offline. Please connect to use Watchlists.

betaDescription.message: Watchlists is currently in beta. Some features may be incomplete or change.

sources_undoDeleteDescription.message: Undo restores this feed's tags, groups, and active state for {{seconds}} seconds.

sources_undoBulkDeleteDescription.message: Undo restores deleted feeds, tags, groups, and active states for {{seconds}} seconds.

sources_undoBulkRestorePartialError.message: {{restored}} restored, {{failed}} failed to restore. Refresh Feeds and retry while the undo timer is active.

sources_deleteConfirmInUseTitle.message: Feed is used by active monitors

sources_deleteConfirmInUseDescription.message: This feed is referenced by {{count}} active monitor{{plural}}. Deleting it may break scheduled runs.

sources_deleteUsageLookupError.message: Could not verify active monitor usage before deletion.

sources_checkNowMultiConfirmDescription.message: This will manually force a refresh for all selected sources.

sources_form_nameTooLong.message: Name must be less than 200 characters

sources_form_testSourceHint.message: Runs a quick fetch preview for this feed. Unsaved URL/type edits are tested.

sources_form_testSourceDisabledHint.message: Save this feed before running a connectivity test.

sources_form_testSourceRequiresSave.message: Create this feed first, then run Test Feed to verify reachability.

sources_form_testSourceNoItems.message: Test completed, but no preview items were returned.

sources_form_forumDisabledHelp.message: Forum monitoring is coming soon. Use RSS Feed or Website for now.

sources_form_tagsHelp.message: Add tags to organize and filter your sources

jobs_description.message: Create monitors that automatically fetch and process updates from your feeds.

jobs_undoDeleteDescription.message: Undo restores this monitor's schedule, feed scope, and delivery settings for {{seconds}} seconds.

jobs_runNowDisabledHint.message: Activate this monitor to run it manually

jobs_metricsHint.message: Showing core columns. Use advanced mode for scope, filters, and run timing.

jobs_form_nameTooLong.message: Name must be less than 200 characters

jobs_form_descriptionPlaceholder.message: Optional description of what this monitor does

jobs_form_scopeRequired.message: Please select at least one feed, group, or tag

jobs_form_scopeRemediation.message: Select at least one feed, group, or tag before saving.

jobs_form_scheduleTooFrequent.message: Schedule is too frequent. Minimum interval is every {{minutes}} minutes.

jobs_form_emailRecipientsInvalidSubmit.message: Fix invalid email recipients before saving.

jobs_form_emailRecipientsRemediation.message: Remove or correct invalid recipient addresses.

jobs_form_presetHint.message: Presets prefill template and delivery defaults. Structured review groups content into non-overlapping sections for easier scanning.

jobs_form_previewLoadError.message: Could not load sample candidates for this monitor.

jobs_form_previewCreateHint.message: Save this monitor once to load sample candidates for live filter preview.

jobs_scope_sourcesHelp.message: Monitor will fetch directly from selected feeds

jobs_scope_groupsHelp.message: Monitor will fetch from all feeds in selected groups

jobs_scope_tagsHelp.message: Monitor will fetch from all feeds with selected tags

filters_noFilters.message: No filters configured. All items will be included.

filters_help.message: Filters determine which items are included, excluded, or flagged during monitor runs. Include filters require at least one match.

schedule_preset_hourly_description.message: Runs once each hour at the selected minute.

schedule_preset_every6hours_description.message: Runs four times each day at the selected minute.

schedule_preset_daily_description.message: Runs every day at the selected time.

schedule_preset_weekly_description.message: Runs once a week on the selected weekday and time.

schedule_advancedHint.message: Enable only if presets cannot express the cadence you need.

schedule_tooFrequent.message: Schedule is too frequent. Minimum interval is every {{minutes}} minutes.

schedule_tooFrequentRemediation.message: Increase schedule interval to meet the minimum cadence.

schedule_helpSimple.message: Use a preset above for most schedules. Turn on Advanced cron only if you need uncommon timing patterns.

schedule_helpAdvanced.message: Cron format: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week. Example: 0 9 * * MON runs every Monday at 09:00.

schedule_help.message: Cron format: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week. Use * for any, */N for every N intervals.

runs_description.message: View execution history and logs for your watchlist monitors.

runs_metricsHint.message: Showing core columns. Use advanced mode for run metrics.

items_description.message: Browse scraped feed items and open the selected source content.

items_selectPrompt.message: Select an item to view its content

items_noUrlHint.message: This item does not include an original URL.

items_batch_noSelected.message: Select one or more items to review.

items_batch_noPage.message: All items on this page are already reviewed.

items_batch_noFiltered.message: No matching unread items to review.

items_batch_confirmAllFilteredTitle.message: Mark all filtered items as reviewed?

items_batch_confirmDescription.message: This will mark {{count}} item{{plural}} as reviewed.

items_batch_failed.message: Failed to mark items as reviewed.

items_savedViews_saveDescription.message: Save the current source, smart feed, status, and search filters.

items_shortcuts_nextPrevious.message: Move to next or previous article in the list.

items_shortcuts_toggleReviewed.message: Toggle reviewed state for the selected article.

items_shortcuts_openOriginal.message: Open the selected article in a new tab.

items_shortcuts_refresh.message: Refresh feeds, article list, and smart counts.

items_shortcuts_newFlow.message: Start a new feed flow by opening Add Source.

sources_importDrop.message: Drop OPML file here or click to upload

sources_importPreviewLookupError.message: Could not load existing feeds for duplicate checks.

sources_importPreviewLoadingExisting.message: Loading existing feeds for duplicate checks...

sources_importPreviewParseError.message: Could not parse this OPML file. Verify it contains outline nodes with xmlUrl attributes.

sources_importPreviewNothingToImport.message: No valid feed entries to import.

sources_importFailedCount.message: {{count}} failed feed{{plural}} ready for recovery actions.

sources_bulkToggleConfirmDescription.message: {{total}} selected ({{active}} active, {{inactive}} inactive). {{impacted}} will change state.

sources_undoBulkMoveDescription.message: Undo restores previous group assignments for {{seconds}} seconds.

sources_bulkDeleteConfirmDescription.message: This will delete {{count}} feeds ({{active}} active, {{inactive}} inactive).

sources_bulkDeleteConfirmInUseSummary.message: {{sources}} selected feed{{sourcesPlural}} are referenced by {{jobs}} active monitor{{jobsPlural}}.

sources_undoBulkToggleDescription.message: Undo restores previous feed states for {{seconds}} seconds.

groups_parentCycleError.message: Cannot move a group into itself or one of its descendants.

runs_detail_remediationFallback.message: Open logs and adjust source or monitor settings, then retry.

runs_detail_filteredSampleSummary.message: Showing {{count}} recently filtered item{{plural}} for quick diagnosis.

runs_detail_filteredSampleHelp.message: Use this sample with filter tallies below to tune include/exclude rules.

runs_detail_logsTruncatedDesc.message: Showing the most recent log output.

outputs_description.message: Generated briefings and reports from your watchlist monitors.

outputs_metricsHint.message: Showing core columns. Use advanced mode for format/run details.

templates_deleteUsageLookupError.message: Could not verify active monitor usage before deletion.

templates_deleteConfirmInUseTitle.message: Template is used by active monitors

templates_deleteConfirmInUseDescription.message: This template is referenced by {{count}} active monitor{{plural}}. Deleting it may affect scheduled reports.

templates_contentPlaceholder.message: Start with plain text or Markdown. Advanced users can add Jinja2 tags later.

templates_preview_note.message: Preview shows rendered markup only; Jinja2 logic is not evaluated.

templates_docs_description.message: These variables are available in your Jinja2 template.

templates_docs_hint.message: Use Jinja2 syntax: {% for item in items %}, {{ item.title }}, {% if condition %}, etc.

overview_description.message: At-a-glance watchlist health, activity, and failure signals.

overview_health_healthyDescription.message: No recent failed runs and source health is stable.

overview_health_degradedDescription.message: Some sources or recent runs show failures. Open failed runs to investigate.

overview_onboarding_pipeline.message: Add Feed -> Configure Monitor -> Check Activity -> Review Articles -> View Reports

overview_onboarding_steps_addFeed_descri.message: Start by adding an RSS/site feed in Feeds.

overview_onboarding_steps_createMonitor_.message: Pick feeds, then set a schedule with presets.

overview_onboarding_steps_reviewResults_.message: Open Activity for run health, Articles for captured content, and Reports for generated briefings.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_reviewDes.message: Preview sample candidates and expected briefing, then create your feed and monitor.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_created.message: Quick setup complete. Feed and monitor created.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_createdAn.message: Quick setup complete. Your first run has started.

overview_setupComplete_nextRunDescriptio.message: Your next monitor run is {{time}}. New content will appear in Articles and Activity.

overview_setupComplete_runNowDescription.message: Run a monitor from Monitors to generate your first Articles and Activity entries.

guide_completedDescription.message: Next: monitor Activity for run health, review Articles for captured content, and open Reports for generated briefings.

guide_steps_sources_description.message: Feeds are inputs for monitors. Add RSS/site feeds before scheduling checks.

guide_steps_jobs_description.message: Monitors connect feeds to schedule, briefing format, and optional audio briefing delivery.

guide_steps_runs_description.message: Activity shows run status, logs, and failures for each monitor.

guide_steps_items_description.message: Articles are captured content from successful runs, ready for triage.

guide_steps_outputs_description.message: Reports show text and audio briefings generated from monitor runs and template choices.

notifications_failureHints_auth.message: Source may require authentication. Verify credentials or access rules.

notifications_failureHints_rateLimit.message: Source is rate-limiting requests. Reduce schedule frequency and retry.

notifications_failureHints_timeout.message: The source request timed out. Retry, or lower concurrency for this source.

notifications_failureHints_dns.message: Source host could not be resolved. Verify the source URL and DNS availability.

notifications_failureHints_tls.message: TLS/SSL validation failed. Verify certificate chain or endpoint URL.

notifications_failureHints_network.message: Source could not be reached. Check connectivity and endpoint availability.

notifications_failureHints_unknownEmpty.message: Open run details to inspect logs and retry.

notifications_failureHints_unknown.message: Open run details to inspect logs and adjust source or filter settings.

errors_next_auth.message: Verify your login/API key permissions for {{context}}, then retry.

errors_next_rateLimit.message: Reduce monitor frequency or wait briefly before retrying.

errors_next_timeout.message: Retry now. If this continues, reduce scope or schedule intensity.

errors_next_network.message: Check server connection and try again.

errors_next_server.message: Retry in a moment. If this keeps failing, check server logs.

errors_next_notFound.message: Refresh the list and confirm the requested records still exist.

errors_next_generic.message: Retry the request. If the problem continues, review server diagnostics.

help_topics_opml_description.message: Use OPML when moving feed lists from another reader so setup takes minutes instead of manual entry.

help_topics_cron_description.message: Use preset timing for most monitors. Switch to custom cron only for uncommon timing windows.

help_topics_ttl_title.message: Control how long outputs stay available

help_topics_ttl_description.message: Set retention to keep briefings only as long as your review workflow needs before automatic cleanup.

help_topics_jinja2_description.message: Start with a preset template to control sections and tone, then customize only if you need advanced formatting.

help_topics_claimClusters_description.message: Subscribe to claim clusters to follow how the same claim evolves across feeds without manual tagging.

settings_description.message: Manage retention and related topic subscriptions for this watchlist workspace.

settings_unavailableDesc.message: Could not load server settings. Make sure the server is running.

settings_ttl_note.message: TTL values are configured on the server.

settings_diagnostics_note.message: Internal diagnostics are enabled for this environment.

settings_clusters_help.message: Claim clusters group similar claims detected across feeds. Subscribe a monitor to include those cluster updates in briefings.

settings_clusters_selectJob.message: Select a monitor to manage cluster subscriptions.

orientation_tabs_overview_what.message: Overview summarizes watchlist health, setup progress, and attention signals.

orientation_tabs_overview_next.message: Next: open Feeds to add sources, then create Monitors.

orientation_tabs_sources_what.message: Feeds are your input sources for monitor runs.

orientation_tabs_sources_next.message: Next: create Monitors to schedule collection from selected feeds.

orientation_tabs_jobs_what.message: Monitors combine feed scope, schedules, filters, and output settings.

orientation_tabs_jobs_next.message: Next: check Activity after runs to confirm collection health.

orientation_tabs_runs_what.message: Activity shows monitor run status, logs, and failures.

orientation_tabs_runs_next.message: Next: open Reports to verify generated briefing outputs.

orientation_tabs_items_what.message: Articles are captured content for daily triage and briefing input.

orientation_tabs_items_next.message: Next: adjust Monitors when article quality or volume needs tuning.

orientation_tabs_outputs_what.message: Reports contains generated briefings, including delivery outcomes.

orientation_tabs_outputs_next.message: Next: refine Templates or Monitors to improve future briefings.

orientation_tabs_templates_what.message: Templates define formatting for generated report and briefing content.

orientation_tabs_templates_next.message: Next: apply template changes in Monitors, then rerun Activity.

orientation_tabs_settings_what.message: Settings controls workspace defaults, retention, and integration options.

orientation_tabs_settings_next.message: Next: return to Feeds or Monitors to apply workspace changes.

overview_attention_description.message: Open the highest-risk surfaces directly from here.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_help_feed.message: Tip: paste a feed URL now. You can adjust feed settings later.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_help_moni.message: No cron needed: choose a preset schedule for now.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_help_revi.message: You can change any of these settings later from Feeds and Monitors.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_hints_aud.message: Enable spoken briefings alongside text reports.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_hints_run.message: Runs one test generation after setup so you can verify results before waiting for the next schedule.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_candidate.message: No sample candidates returned yet. You can still create setup and validate with a test run.
Could not load feed sample preview right now. You can still create setup and use a test run to verify results.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_templateP.message: No briefing output will be generated for feed-review-only setup.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_destinati.message: Starts one test run immediately and opens Activity details.
Opens Reports after setup. Use Run now in Monitors if you want an immediate briefing.
Opens Monitors after setup so you can run checks when ready.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_createdBr.message: Quick setup complete. Feed and monitor created for briefing reports.

overview_onboarding_quickSetup_testRunPe.message: Quick setup complete. Test run started. Open Activity for progress and Reports for generated briefings.

teachPoints_cron_title.message: Use schedule presets before custom cron

teachPoints_cron_description.message: Start with a preset schedule. Use custom cron only for uncommon timing.

teachPoints_filters_title.message: Use filters to reduce noisy items

teachPoints_filters_description.message: Add include/exclude filters when monitors collect too much or irrelevant content.

teachPoints_templates_title.message: Start from a briefing template preset

teachPoints_templates_description.message: Pick a preset template first, then edit only the sections you need to customize.

notifications_failureHints_stalled.message: Run appears stalled after {{minutes}} minutes. Open Activity to inspect logs, then cancel or retry.

errors_next_dns.message: Verify the source host resolves correctly and retry.

errors_next_tls.message: Verify TLS certificate settings for the endpoint and retry.

sources_undoBulkDeleteVariableWindowHint.message: Some feeds expire sooner; use Undo before this timer ends.

sources_undoRestoreError.message: Could not restore this feed. Refresh Feeds and retry while the undo timer is active.

sources_form_testSourceDraftHint.message: Run Test Feed to validate URL/type connectivity before saving.

sources_form_testSourceErrorHintForumDis.message: Forum feeds are not enabled yet. Switch type to RSS Feed or Website.

sources_form_testSourceErrorHintYoutube.message: Use a canonical YouTube feed URL (channel_id or playlist_id) and retry.

sources_form_testSourceErrorHintNotFound.message: This saved feed no longer exists. Refresh feeds and open it again.

sources_form_testSourceErrorHintNetwork.message: Check server connectivity, then run Test Feed again.

sources_form_testSourceErrorHintGeneric.message: Review URL and feed type, then retry. If this persists, check server logs.

jobs_undoRestoreError.message: Could not restore this monitor. Refresh Monitors and retry while the undo timer is active.

jobs_form_modeHelpBasic.message: Basic mode hides optional filters and delivery fine-tuning so you can set up a monitor faster.

jobs_form_modeHelpAdvanced.message: Advanced mode exposes all scheduling, filtering, retention, and delivery controls.

jobs_form_modeHiddenSettingsNotice.message: Advanced settings are preserved and will still apply, but they are hidden in Basic mode.

jobs_form_scheduleRequiredForBasic.message: Set a schedule before continuing to review.

jobs_form_audioHint.message: Enable spoken briefings alongside text outputs. Keep defaults for fastest setup.

jobs_form_audioItemCapHint.message: Audio briefings currently include up to 100 items per run. Tighten filters for more focused narration.

jobs_form_audioVoiceMapInvalid.message: Voice map must be valid JSON with marker-to-voice string pairs.

jobs_form_audioAdvancedHint.message: Use advanced options only if you need soundtrack mixing or custom speaker-to-voice assignments.

jobs_form_steps_reviewHint.message: Use Create/Save to finalize this monitor.

filters_summary_keywordEmpty.message: {{action}} items with no keyword terms yet.

filters_summary_authorEmpty.message: {{action}} items with no author list yet.

schedule_beginnerHint.message: Most users should use presets. Turn on cron only for uncommon timing.

schedule_advancedOptionalHint.message: Most users should use presets. Turn on cron only for uncommon timing.

schedule_cronFieldOrderHint.message: Field order: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week.

schedule_cronBeginnerHint.message: If cron is new, start with a quick example below and edit one field at a time.

schedule_cronFieldCountError.message: Use exactly 5 cron fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week.

schedule_cronInvalidTokenError.message: Cron tokens can only include letters, numbers, *, /, -, ?, and comma.

schedule_examplesHint.message: Choose one, then adjust values if you need a different cadence.

runs_attention_description.message: {{failed}} failed run{{failedPlural}} and {{stalled}} stalled run{{stalledPlural}} need review.

runs_detail_linkageDescription.message: Monitor #{{jobId}} produced {{count}} report{{plural}} for this run.

items_sourceCatalogCapHint.message: Showing first {{count}} feeds. Use Feeds tab filters to narrow your source list.

items_sourceWindowHint.message: Showing {{visible}} of {{total}} feeds. Scroll to load more.

items_briefingAlreadyIncluded.message: This item is already included in briefing outputs.

items_briefingIncluded.message: Added to the next briefing queue.

items_briefingIncludeError.message: Failed to include item in briefing.

items_batch_scopeSummary.message: Selected: {{selected}} unread • This page: {{page}} unread • All filtered: {{allFiltered}} unread.

items_batch_confirmDescriptionScoped.message: Scope: {{scope}}. This will mark {{count}} item{{plural}} as reviewed.

items_savedViews_defaultsHint.message: Default triage views are pinned. Save changes as a custom view.

templates_modeHelpBasic.message: Basic mode is no-code: pick a recipe, edit text, and preview your output.

templates_modeHelpAdvanced.message: Advanced mode adds Jinja2 snippets, variable docs, and version tools.

templates_modeHiddenToolsNotice.message: Advanced template tools are hidden in Basic mode. Your content and version context are preserved.

templates_modeVersionToolsHidden.message: Version tools are available in Advanced mode.

templates_visualOutOfSyncTitle.message: Visual layout may be out of sync

templates_visualOutOfSyncDescription.message: The template was edited in code mode and the visual block layout may need repair.

templates_repairVisualLayoutSuccess.message: Visual layout re-synced from the current template code.

templates_modeBasicEditorHint.message: Start in Basic mode with plain text or Markdown. Switch to Advanced only if you need variables, loops, or version tools.

templates_syntaxErrorBeforeSave.message: Could not save template. Fix syntax errors, then try again.

templates_recipe_briefingMdDescription.message: Daily digest layout with summary and per-item entries.

templates_recipe_newsletterHtmlDescripti.message: Email-friendly HTML brief with linked story sections.
